overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a vibrant cyberpunk night market featuring neon-lit stalls, industrial metal architecture, and wet reflective surfaces. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (likely Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed NPC interactions.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk market walkway with industrial metal pillars and neon-lit food stalls. Steam rises from a vent on the left while various NPCs walk through the corridor. The ground is wet and reflective under fluorescent and neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider lounge area dominated by a bright turquoise CHILLAX neon sign. Two futuristic motorcycles are parked in front of a graffiti-covered wall with a worn couch. The camera approaches this area, observes the details, then turns to head back.

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrower market passage with a record vendor stall on the left displaying cardboard boxes of merchandise. A green neon OPEN sign glows in the distance as the camera passes by a vendor checking a tablet and continues toward a blue-walled corridor.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor with distinctive blue painted walls. A SWEET CLEAN SPEED vending machine with a large advertisement poster is prominent on the right, where a woman with purple hair leans against the wall. The corridor features industrial details like a metal ladder and leads toward an exit into a brighter open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk market plaza with multi-level buildings and various stalls

large red billboard with white Japanese characters and demon face design

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow corridor into a spacious open market plaza surrounded by towering multi-level cyberpunk buildings. The WASABI MARKET stall with its red signage is prominent on the right, while various other vendors and shoppers populate the wet reflective plaza. Large neon billboards with Japanese characters illuminate the scene from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense cyberpunk market that transitions from narrow, industrial corridors into a sprawling, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by moving through a covered walkway where steam rises from vents and fluorescent lights reflect off wet pavement beside bustling food stalls. As the path opens into a wider lounge, the camera glides toward a bright turquoise CHILLAX sign and parked futuristic motorcycles before turning back to navigate a tighter passage lined with record vendors and glowing green signage. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor with blue walls and a prominent vending machine, passing a purple-haired woman and industrial ladders that lead toward a bright exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the confinement of the hallway into a vast open plaza dominated by the red signage of the Wasabi Market and towering buildings topped with massive Japanese neon billboards.
